notificare.heading: Got a compliance notice (notificare de conformare) from ANAF?
notificare.body: If ANAF asked you to declare investment income from past years, InvesTax computes 2023, 2024 and 2025 each on that year's rules (dividends are 8% for 2023 and 2024, with each year's own CASS brackets) and gives you the values to carry into your amended return.
notificare.anchor: An accountant typically charges a few hundred lei per year (around 400-600 lei for a return with investment income). A single InvesTax payment gives you 365 days of access to every supported year, 2023 through 2025.
notificare.guardrail: InvesTax is a software tool, not personalized tax advice: we don't assess your letter and don't promise any outcome with ANAF.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes. The quick calculator is 100% free, no account needed. You enter your totals and get your tax estimate instantly.
faq.q2: What does the paid plan add?
faq.a2: Upload your Trading212 PDF or CSV statement and get an automatic, detailed breakdown per security: capital gains, dividends, BNR rates, CASS, and a D212-ready guide. No manual work.
faq.a3: No. It's a one-time annual payment. You pay once and get 365 days of access. No auto-renewal, no recurring charges.
faq.a4: Yes. Contact us within 14 days of purchase for a full refund, no questions asked.
faq.a5: We use the official BNR exchange rates and the weighted average cost (WAC) method, one of the methods used in retail practice for self-declaration with non-resident brokers (FIFO is also accepted; choose a method and apply it consistently). We apply the tax rules valid for tax year 2025: 10% capital gains tax on income through non-resident brokers (Trading212, IBKR, eToro, Revolut), plus CASS and dividend tax per the fiscal code. All amounts are converted to RON.
faq.a6: Your uploaded statements are processed and never shared. You can export or delete all your data at any time from Settings. We never sell user data.
faq.a7: Trading 212 (PDF and CSV), plus Interactive Brokers and Revolut in beta (double-check the result before filing).
faq.q8: Does this apply to tax year 2026?
faq.a8: No. Starting January 1, 2026, Law 239/2025 changed the tax rate to 16% for capital gains through non-resident brokers (Trading212, Interactive Brokers, eToro, Revolut). For Romania-resident brokers (XTB Romania, Tradeville, BT Capital Partners, etc.), withholding at source applies at 3% or 6% depending on holding period. InvesTax calculates taxes on income earned in 2025, filed via Declarația Unică by May 25, 2026. We will update the calculator for tax year 2026 before the 2027 filing season.
faq.q9: Can I compute past years if I received a compliance notice?
faq.a9: Yes. InvesTax computes tax years 2023, 2024 and 2025, each on its own rules (dividends are 8% for 2023 and 2024, not 10%, and the CASS brackets differ by year), and gives you the values for your amended return. Full access covers every supported year with a single payment, not per year. We don't file on your behalf and don't give advice on your specific case.
